title: Rhysopterus corrugatus
taxonomy: Rhysopterus corrugatus is classified within the class Hymenoptera. This order includes insects such as bees, wasps, ants, and sawflies. Further classification places Rhysopterus corrugatus within the family Cynipidae, commonly known as gall wasps. These gall wasps are known for inducing the formation of galls on their host plants. The specific classification of Rhysopterus corrugatus may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a species of gall wasp.
